tracks.meaning: a round deep dish used for serving or eating food, typically made of ceramic, glass, or metal
the act of rolling a ball down an alley toward pins in bowling
to move rapidly and smoothly, especially said of a vehicle or person moving with momentum
a rounded or cup-shaped hollow part or structure of the body
a wide rounded valley or depression in the landscape
any container or receptacle shaped like a bowl used for holding objects
to move along quickly or with force, often used in the phrase 'bowl along'
an outdoor amphitheater or stadium shaped like a large bowl
